sentences.translation: Iskrenost je velika vrlina u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great virtue in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: „Zaista iskrenost vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet“ [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Indeed, truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ أَنْ يَقُولَ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman uči da uvijek govori istinu u svom životu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim learns to always speak the truth in his life.

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ يَجْعَلُ النَّاسَ يَثِقُونَ بِكَ وَيُحِبُّونَكَ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost čini da vam ljudi vjeruju i da vas vole.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness makes people trust and love you.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَرْفَعُ دَرَجَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ عِنْدَ اللهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Ovaj ahlak podiže stepen vjernika kod Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This character trait raises the believer's rank with Allah the Almighty.
